use-line-spacing-property-for-leading.note: Use the TextState.LineSpacing property to set custom line spacing (leading) for a TextStamp; the TextState.Leading property does not exist.
errors: CS1061: 'TextState' does not contain a definition for 'Leading'

remove-isrighttoleft-and-use-unicode-fon.note: Do not set a non‑existent IsRightToLeft property on TextState; instead assign a Unicode font that supports Arabic/Hebrew and Aspose.Pdf will render RTL text automatically.
errors: CS1061: 'TextState' does not contain a definition for 'IsRightToLeft'

use-page-addstamp-loop.note: Document does not have an AddStamp method; apply a stamp to all pages by iterating over Document.Pages and calling Page.AddStamp for each page.
errors: CS1061: 'Document' does not contain a definition for 'AddStamp' and no accessible extension method 'AddStamp' accepting a first argument of type 'Document' could be found

omit-title-on-popupannotation.note: Do not set the Title property on PopupAnnotation because it is defined only on MarkupAnnotation; remove or replace it with appropriate markup annotation.
errors: CS1061: 'PopupAnnotation' does not contain a definition for 'Title'

use-systemdrawingcolor-for-defaultappear.note: When creating a FreeTextAnnotation, pass a System.Drawing.Color to DefaultAppearance and SetTextStyle, and use an integer (0) for the style parameter instead of RichTextFontStyles.None.
use-systemdrawingcolor-for-defaultappear.code:
DefaultAppearance appearance = new DefaultAppearance("Arial", 12, System.Drawing.Color.Black);
ft.SetTextStyle(0, "Arial", 12, System.Drawing.Color.Black);
errors: CS1503: Argument 3: cannot convert from 'Aspose.Pdf.Color' to 'System.Drawing.Color'
CS0117: 'RichTextFontStyles' does not contain a definition for 'None'

use-highlightannotation-with-rectangle.note: Create a HighlightAnnotation using the page and the fragment's Rectangle (new HighlightAnnotation(page, rect)) instead of passing coordinate doubles.
errors: CS1503: Argument 1: cannot convert from 'double' to 'Aspose.Pdf.Point'
CS1503: Argument 2: cannot convert from 'double' to 'bool'

use-integer-for-border-width.note: Set the Border.Width property with an integer value (not a float) when configuring annotation borders.
use-integer-for-border-width.code: var border = new Border(annotation) { Width = 2 }; // Width is int
errors: CS0266: Cannot implicitly convert type 'float' to 'int' when assigning to Border.Width

avoid-annotation-id-property.note: Do not use a non‑existent Id property on Aspose.Pdf.Annotations.Annotation; instead access supported members such as AnnotationType, Name, etc.
errors: CS1061: 'Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Id' and no accessible extension method 'Id' accepting a first argument of type 'Annotation' could be found

use-specific-figure-annotation-type-for-.note: When working with figure annotations, cast the base Annotation to its concrete type (e.g., SquareAnnotation or CircleAnnotation) and use the AppearanceDictionary type to access the appearance; then set Color and InteriorColor on the concrete annotation.
errors: CS0246: The type or namespace name 'Appearance' could not be found
CS1061: 'Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'InteriorColor'

use-flags-hidden-for-annotation-visibili.note: Use the Flags property with AnnotationFlags.Hidden (via bitwise OR) to hide an annotation, instead of the non‑existent Visibility property and AnnotationVisibility enum.
errors: CS1061: 'Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Visibility'
CS0103: The name 'AnnotationVisibility' does not exist in the current context

annotation-id-and-author-extraction.note: In Aspose.Pdf versions where Annotation.Id is not available, use Annotation.Name as the identifier and obtain the author from the Title property of MarkupAnnotation or TextAnnotation.
errors: 'Annotation' does not contain a definition for 'Id'

remove-invalid-activationevent-mousedown.note: Do not assign RichMediaAnnotation.ActivationEvent.MouseDown because the ActivationEvent enum does not define a MouseDown member; simply omit the setting or use a valid enum value.
errors: CS0117: 'RichMediaAnnotation.ActivationEvent' does not contain a definition for 'MouseDown'

use-supported-pdf3dlightingscheme.note: Use a valid PDF3DLightingScheme enum value (e.g., Headlamp) instead of removed members such as Flat or Simple.
use-supported-pdf3dlightingscheme.code: PDF3DArtwork artwork = new PDF3DArtwork(doc, content, PDF3DLightingScheme.Headlamp, PDF3DRenderMode.Solid);
errors: CS0117: 'PDF3DLightingScheme' does not contain a definition for 'Flat'

check-file-exists-before-artifact-setima.note: Verify the image file exists before calling BackgroundArtifact.SetImage to prevent FileNotFoundException.
errors: System.IO.FileNotFoundException thrown by Artifact.SetImage when the specified image file does not exist

compare-artifact-subtype-as-string.note: When checking an Artifact's Subtype, use its string representation (and null‑check) instead of the ArtifactSubtype enum to stay compatible with all Aspose.PDF versions.
errors: CS0103: The name 'ArtifactSubtype' does not exist in the current context

use-artifactcollection-delete.note: Remove artifacts from a page using ArtifactCollection.Delete instead of non‑existent Remove/RemoveAt methods.
errors: CS1061: 'ArtifactCollection' does not contain a definition for 'RemoveAt'
CS1061: 'ArtifactCollection' does not contain a definition for 'Remove'

use-invisible-rectangle-for-soundannotat.note: Create a SoundAnnotation with a tiny (0,0,1,1) rectangle so the annotation is invisible yet plays the sound when the page is opened.
errors: Visible annotation icon appears on the page
Need to trigger sound on page load without showing an annotation
